description.value: Aura strong abjuration; CL 19th; Weight 1 lb.; Slot none; Price 25,000 gp DESCRIPTION This lustrous green gemstone is uncut and about the size of a human fist. The gem grants its bearer the use of the following abilities: 1 charge: entropic shield 1 charge: lesser confusion 1 charge: magic circle against law 2 charges: chaos hammer A newly created chaos emerald has 1d6+2 charges. It can hold a maximum of 10 charges and automatically regains 1d3-1 charges each day. A non-chaotic creature who holds or carries a chaos emerald gains one negative level. This negative level persists as long as the creature holds or carries the gem and disappears when the gem is dropped. This negative level cannot be overcome in any way (including restoration spells) while held or carried. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, chaos hammer, entropic shield, lesser confusion, magic circle against law; Special creator must be chaotic; Cost 12,500 gp
